description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 3rd; Slot hands; Price 4,000 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION The wearer of these gauntlets gains a +2 bonus on one type of combat maneuver check (such as bull rush, disarm, or steal ) chosen by the creator when the item is created. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Special creator must have the appropriate Improved combat maneuver feat ( Improved Bull Rush, Improved Dirty Trick, Improved Disarm, Improved Drag, Improved Grapple, Improved Overrun, Improved Reposition, Improved Steal, Improved Sunder, or Improved Trip ); Cost 2,000 gp.
